metadata.displayName: Audit Arc machines tagged for Defender exclusion
metadata.description: Audits Azure Arc machines with DefenderForServers=Disabled tag. These machines are marked for exclusion from Defender for Servers Plan 2. Use this policy with remediation automation (Azure Automation runbook, Logic App, or Function) to uninstall/disable Defender agents on tagged Arc machines, or manually configure exclusions in Defender for Cloud settings.
